Package chemaxon.standardizer.advancedactions

Contains advanced standardizer actions.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Clean2DAction
    Clean molecule graph in 2D standardizer action
    Clean3DAction
    Clean molecule graph in 3D standardizer action
    CreateGroupAction
    Create Group standardizer action
    GroupDefinition
    Pattern of a group.
    RemoveSolventsAction
    Remove solvents standardizer action
    Additionally solvents can be added in action string:
    Example configuration: "removesolvents:benzene='c1ccccc1':water='[#8]'"
    StripSaltsAction
    Strip salts standardizer action
    Additionally salts can be added in action string:
    Example configuration: "stripsalts:na='[Na+]':soo='[#8]S([#8])(=O)=O'"
    TransformAction
    Transformation standardizer action
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    Clean2DAction.Type
    Type of clean action (partial, full, template based or convert 3D to 2D)

Package chemaxon.standardizer.advancedactions Description

Contains advanced standardizer actions.
